CrewMember.title: CrewMember
CrewMember.description: An RSVP attendee representing a pilot registering for Captain Mateo's birthday flights.

id.description: Document ID or unique ID for the crew member.

name.description: Full name of the crew member/pilot.

status.description: Whether the pilot is ready to fly or on reserve.

copilots.description: Number of additional family members or flight copilots registering under this name.

timestamp.description: Server or ISO timestamp of the RSVP.

crew/{crewId}.description: Collection of all flight crew RSVPs.
